AgentNode.prompt: Conduct a deep research report on @[Primary Topic/Keyword](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae3) for the target audience: @[Target Audience](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae4). Analyze these competitors: @[Specific Competitors to Analyze](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae7). Write in @[Output Language](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae6).

Based on the research from @[Market & Competitor Research](type=WORKFLOW_NODE&workflowNodeId=6a58ac59185298d443590ad6), create a comprehensive blog outline for @[Primary Topic/Keyword](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae3). Ensure it matches the @[Brand Voice](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae5) and is written in @[Output Language](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae6).

Write a full long-form SEO blog article based on the outline in @[Content Strategy & Outline](type=WORKFLOW_NODE&workflowNodeId=6a58ac5a185298d443590ad7). Use the following brand voice: @[Brand Voice](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae5). Targeted Audience: @[Target Audience](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae4). Language: @[Output Language](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae6).

Review and edit the article from @[Long-Form SEO Article](type=WORKFLOW_NODE&workflowNodeId=6a58ac5a185298d443590ad8) for SEO quality, readability, and alignment with the @[Brand Voice](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae5). Language: @[Output Language](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae6).

OrchestratorWorkerNode.orchestratorPrompt: Analyze the final article from @[SEO & Quality Review](type=WORKFLOW_NODE&workflowNodeId=6a58ac5a185298d443590ad9) and delegate the creation of distribution materials (Facebook post, LinkedIn post, and Newsletter) to the specialists. Use the brand voice: @[Brand Voice](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae5) and language: @[Output Language](type=WORKFLOW_HUMAN_INPUT_FIELD&workflowHumanInputFieldId=6a58ac5c185298d443590ae6).
